column5: FASB

column1: # Verify dates against primary sources where available

column5: description
Defined Bitcoin as virtual commodity; barred financial institutions from handling it
Exchange halted withdrawals; filed for bankruptcy on 28 Feb 2014
First comprehensive state-level crypto regulatory regime (NYDFS)

column2: Japan recognises crypto as payment method
column5: PSA amended to recognise virtual currency as lawful payment method; FSA exchange registration
Seven agencies jointly banned all ICOs as unauthorised illegal fundraising

column2: FATF extends Travel Rule to VAs
column5: FATF extended Recommendation 16 to virtual assets and VASPs (formal adoption June 2019)

column2: IFRS IC Agenda Decision on crypto
column5: IFRS IC concluded crypto should be accounted as intangible assets (IAS 38) or inventory (IAS 2)
Fifth Anti-Money Laundering Directive extended obligations to crypto exchange and wallet providers

column2: El Salvador adopts Bitcoin as legal tender
column5: Legislative Assembly passed Bitcoin Law (effective 7 Sep 2021)
PBOC and nine agencies banned all crypto transactions and mining
First G-SIB to custody Bitcoin and Ether for institutional clients
MiCA (Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation) adopted
Published in Official Journal; entered into force 20 days later
Final rules requiring mandatory cybersecurity incident disclosure
Fair value measurement for certain crypto assets (effective FY after 15 Dec 2024)
Approved 11 spot Bitcoin ETF 19b-4 applications; trading began 11 Jan
Approved 8 spot Ether ETF 19b-4 applications (S-1 registrations followed)

column2: MiCA Title III and IV effective
column5: Rules for asset-referenced tokens and e-money tokens came into application
Title V (CASPs) and EU Transfer of Funds Regulation took effect

column2: El Salvador rescinds Bitcoin legal tender status
column5: Substantially rescinded Bitcoin Law as part of IMF loan deal

column2: FATF Best Practices on Travel Rule
column5: 73% of jurisdictions had passed Travel Rule legislation
Stablecoin regulation bill passed Senate
Brought cryptoassets within FCA regulatory remit
Crypto exchanges and custody providers require AFSL
Full regime effective 25 October 2027
